info.name: Microsoft Azure SubscriptionDefinitionsClient
info.description: Subscription definitions client provides an interface to create, modify and retrieve azure subscriptions programmatically.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Subscription Operations

query.description: (Required) Version of the API to be used with the client request. Current version is 2015-06-01

request.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Subscription API operations.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Subscription Subscriptionoperations Operationid

query.description: (Required) Version of the API to be used with the client request. Current version is 2015-06-01

variable.description: (Required) The operation ID, which can be found from the Location field in the generate recommendation response header.

response.name: Successful completion of the asynchronous operation
